source: Gaia DR3 gaiadr3.gaia_source via ESA Gaia Archive TAP
query:
SELECT
  source_id,
  ra,
  dec,
  phot_g_mean_mag,
  phot_bp_mean_mag,
  phot_rp_mean_mag,
  parallax,
  pmra,
  pmdec
FROM gaiadr3.gaia_source
WHERE ra BETWEEN 255 AND 310
  AND dec BETWEEN 20 AND 50
  AND phot_g_mean_mag IS NOT NULL
  AND phot_g_mean_mag <= 7.5
ORDER BY phot_g_mean_mag ASC
